---
title: "The Rev. William Edward Heygate"
---

## The Rev. William Edward Heygate

**Dates:** (1816-1902)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1869)

### Biography

A curate in Cornwall and Essex, he became Vicar of Brighstone, Isle of Wight in succession to the Rt. Rev. George Moberly.  He was a  theologian and Tractarian novelist. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Nov 3d 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
